summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster and not to invent a shared canonical, so unrelated non-security open PRs are kept as independent candidates for normal maintainer review. Deterministic validation identified #79137 and #90154 as security-sensitive, so those exact PRs are quarantined with non-mutating route_security actions. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-pr mutation is recommended.
